creator: David and Jeff
description: David and Jeff discuss the very first episode of Survivor: Philippines with special guest Kat Edorsson from Survivor: One World. Kat shares her thoughts on the premiere episode, plus her experience on the show. She also tells a truly memorable story that never made it on the air. For a podcast that always follows Russell Swan, listen to David and Jeff's Survivor Podcast!
